tips.title: Tips Before You Buy a Domain
tips.subtitle: Make the right choice for your online presence with these expert tips.

short.title: Keep It Short
short.description: Try to keep your domain name under 15 characters. Shorter names are easier to remember and type.

simple.title: Keep It Simple
simple.description: Avoid hyphens, numbers, and unusual spellings that confuse visitors.

brand.title: Include Your Brand
brand.description: Use your brand name or relevant keywords to boost recognition and SEO.

availability.title: Check Availability
availability.description: Search thoroughly and ensure your name isn't trademarked elsewhere.

local.title: Think Locally
local.description: Consider country-specific extensions like .co.uk or .de for local targeting.

fast.title: Act Fast
fast.description: Great domains sell quickly. Secure yours before someone else does.

items.question: How long does domain registration take?
items.answer: Domain registration is usually instant. Once you complete the purchase, the domain is yours and ready to be used immediately.

items.question: Can I transfer my domain to you?
items.answer: Yes, you can transfer any eligible domain to us. The process usually takes 5-7 days depending on the TLD registry.

items.question: Do I get full ownership?
items.answer: Yes, you are the legal owner of any domain name registered through us for the duration of your registration period.

items.question: Is WHOIS privacy included?
items.answer: Yes, we provide free WHOIS privacy protection for all eligible TLDs to keep your personal information safe from spammers.

items.question: Can I get a free domain?
items.answer: Yes! You get a free domain for the first year when you purchase any annual web hosting plan.

contact.heading: Need Help Choosing the Right Plan?
contact.description1: Book a short call with our team. One of WebblyHosting's specialists will help you choose the right hosting package based on your website, business goals, and budget. We want to make your decision simple and stress-free.
contact.description2: By submitting your details, you agree to WebblyHosting contacting you for support and guidance regarding your hosting needs.
